subcodes.first_line: We have sacrificed all that exists in the path of God and, without veil or concealment, have raised Our call before the faces of all the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما فی الوجود را در سبیل الهی انفاق نمودیم و من غیر ستر و حجاب امام وجوه عالم ندا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @justice and wrath of God
